title: Style tag injection in custom CSS
description: If custom CSS or theme tokens are interpolated into a style block, a </style> sequence breaks out of the tag. Must strip </style> (case-insensitive) before rendering. Check Broadside's profile/theme CSS rendering.
close_reason: Fixed: server.rs line 127 now uses case-insensitive regex to strip all variants of </style> (</STYLE>, </Style>, etc.). All 13 tests passing.
